description_long: This is a large, classic executive desk crafted from dark-stained wood, featuring a broad rectangular top with a slightly beveled edge. The front side is equipped with a symmetrical arrangement of six drawers, three on each side, and a central shallow drawer, all with metal pull handles. The sides and back of the desk are solid wood panels with subtle decorative molding, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, with some areas showing a slightly distressed or aged finish, adding character. The desk sits on short, blocky feet that elevate it slightly off the ground. Its substantial size and multiple storage compartments suggest it is designed for heavy-duty office or study use.
description: A large, dark wood executive desk with multiple drawers and a broad, rectangular top. It features classic styling, visible wood grain, and metal handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing six side drawers, a central shallow drawer, and all metal handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wood panel with visible grain and no drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, solid wood panel and no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a solid wood panel with no drawers.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and handles is intended to face the user, serving as the front, while the solid panel side is the back.
attribute_usage_context: executive workspace or writing desk for paperwork and organization
